Vote.title: Vote
Vote.description: A user's vote (up or down) on a specific lesson.

lessonId.description: The ID of the lesson being voted on.

userId.description: The UID of the user who cast the vote.

type.description: The type of vote: up or down.

Suggestion.title: Suggestion
Suggestion.description: A YouTube URL suggested by a user for a downvoted lesson.

lessonId.description: The ID of the lesson for which the suggestion is made.

userId.description: The UID of the user who made the suggestion.

Customization.title: Customization
Customization.description: A user's personal video replacement for a specific lesson.

lessonId.description: The ID of the lesson being customized.

userId.description: The UID of the user who made the customization.

customUrl.description: The user's personal YouTube URL replacement.

Report.title: Report
Report.description: A user's report of an issue with a specific lesson.

lessonId.description: The ID of the lesson being reported.

userId.description: The UID of the user who made the report.

details.description: Optional additional details about the issue.

Certificate.title: Certificate
Certificate.description: A record of a course completion.

courseId.description: The ID of the completed course.

userId.description: The UID of the user who completed the course.

userName.description: The name of the user on the certificate.

certificateId.description: The unique ID of the certificate.

Progress.title: Progress
Progress.description: A user's progress in a specific course.

lessonProgress.description: Map of lessonId to LessonProgress objects.

lastUpdated.description: When the progress was last updated.

completedAt.description: When the course was marked complete (optional).

CourseRating.title: CourseRating
CourseRating.description: A user's star rating for a completed course.

/votes/{voteId}.description: Collection of user votes on lessons.

/suggestions/{suggestionId}.description: Collection of video suggestions for downvoted lessons.

/customizations/{customizationId}.description: Collection of user's personal video replacements for lessons.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Collection of user reports of issues with lessons.

/progress/{progressId}.description: Collection of user course progress records.

/courseRatings/{ratingId}.description: Collection of user course ratings after completion.
